UserComments.Comment: The charging station worx properly,but E.On company repeatedly performed deceptive behavior with goal to cheat U with pricing.For example their 8hrs.limit counts also for night,even they tell/write U the opposite,it is a trap,also they often charge U day-price(9.5CZK/KWh) also @ night(when they announce 8CZK/KWh),they r always lieing with pricing,be aware & do not forget interrupt charging every 8hrs.to avoid extra fees & do so also during night,they announced,that parking fee free minutes r not being deducted during night,but they R & by believing them 1ce,i was charged extra 745CZK.E.On is a highly deceptive company.

I was here @ night,it was closed,thus I used wall socket on the wall of nearby building @ the external parking lot, then an emploee-a security guard appeared & opened the charging hub for me,then I finished charging inside & with the current weather I very appreciated the roof,I love such charging stations, where I am not exposed to wild weather, when I am setting up my cables,or when I am packing them after finished charging, I guess,every1 will love,when U do not have wet cables & U r not exposed to rain,nor wind,when U r setting up/packing Your cables.If U r traveling here in winter,or in rainy weather, this is the best charging hub to pick.Live long & prosper.

AddressInfo.Title: E.On Public Charging Station (8xAC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: May be closed,when the shopping mall is closed,but there is 1 live 1-phase 16A,230V socket outside on the wall of adjacent building part on the external parking lot.

Connections.Comments: Covered-roofed charging hub,comfortable in whatever weather.

GeneralComments: Roofed,comfortable place,but when Olympia is closed,the charging hub may be closed too,in this case there is 1-phase Schuko socket outside @ parking lot on the wall,there r other 4 dedicated parking places for EVs with 2 LOCKED Schuko sockets.Each Mennekes charging point has fixedcable & dedicated parking place.
